description: When resuming a long Phase 4 task, the agent must continue from the saved state machine instead of restarting decomposition or recreating an Agent Pack.
input: 继续上次的长任务。已有 state_machine.v1 快照，currentSubtaskId 是 B，resumeFrom 指向 B。请从中断点恢复执行。
expectedBehavior: The response should use the existing Phase 4 state machine, resume from resumeFrom.subtaskId/currentSubtaskId, identify the nextAction, and continue from the saved execution coordinate without restarting Phase -1 or recreating the Agent Pack.
